copy.landing_blurb: Pick lineage and build. Same seed gives the same sheet.
copy.sub_archetype_intro: Narrow the build. Same archetype, different emphasis.
copy.predator_intro: How your character hunts — affects creation options and flaws.
copy.full_random_hint: Skip the build steps — randomly pick lineage, archetype, and subtype, then generate. Vampires also get a predator type; ghouls pick a domitor clan.
copy.xp_intro: Choose how much experience the character has to spend. You can pick a venue chart, a fixed amount, or enter any value.
